chapter_title.ar: بَابُ مَا أَخَذَهُ اللَّهُ عَلَى الْمُؤْمِنِ مِنَ الصَّبْرِ عَلَى مَا يَلْحَقُهُ فِيمَا ابْتُلِيَ بِهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 105 – What (Covenant) Allah<sup>azwj</sup> has Taken upon the Momin, from the patience upon whatever he faces regarding what he has been afflicted with

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/319)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/319)
text: سَمِعْتُهُ يَقُولُ إِذَا مَاتَ الْمُؤْمِنُ خَلَّى عَلَى جِيرَانِهِ مِنَ الشَّيَاطِينِ عَدَدَ رَبِيعَةَ وَ مُضَرَ كَانُوا مُشْتَغِلِينَ بِهِ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ibn Mahboub, from Amro Bin Shimr, from Jabir,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’farasws, said, ‘I heard himasws saying: ‘When the Momin dies, the Satansla of the number of the (tribes of) Rabi’e and Muzar are freed to be upon his neighbours, who used to be pre-occupied with him’.
en.sarwar: 10. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from ibn Mahbub from ‘ Amr ibn Shamir from Jabir who has said the following: “I heard abu Ja’far (a.s.) saying, ‘When a believer dies the devils working to mislead him, now released among his neighbors, number equal to all the people of the tribe of Rabi’ and Mudar.’”
